title: EB has update, CC on the latest -  Update button, Release notes and Poly Lens links are available
scenario: Firmware update button on device home screen navigates to Device Settings with Software Update tab expanded, showing earbuds update, badge, and charge case info with links to Release Notes and Poly Lens App
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. On the Home screen, ensure the earbuds have a firmware update available and the charge case is on the latest firmware version.
3. Observe the Home screen for the presence of an 'Update' button.
5. Observe that the app navigates to Device Settings with the Software Update tab expanded.
6. Verify that the 'Update' button is only available for the earbuds (not for the charge case).
7. Check that a '1' badge is shown on the Software Update settings tab.
8. Verify that information about needing Poly Lens Desktop for the charge case is displayed.
9. Check that a link to Release Notes (for the earbuds) is present.
10. Check that a link to the Poly Lens App (for the charge case) is present.
expected: The 'Update' button is displayed on the Home screen when the earbuds have a firmware update available and the charge case is on the latest version. Tapping it navigates to Device Settings with the Software Update tab expanded. The 'Update' button is only available for the earbuds, a '1' badge is shown on the settings tab, info about needing Poly Lens Desktop for the charge case is displayed, and links to Release Notes (for earbuds) and Poly Lens App (for charge case) are present.
